images.title: The British Army in Normandy, 1944 B5029.jpg
images.description:
The British Army in Normandy, 1944
Two walking wounded making their way back through Lion sur Mer.

images.title: The British Army in Normandy 1944 B5039.jpg
images.description:
The British Army in Normandy 1944
Men of 2nd Royal Ulster Rifles pause during the move inland from Sword Beach, 6 June 1944.

images.title: The British Army in Normandy 1944 B5028.jpg
images.description:
The British Army in Normandy 1944
A French civilian greets British troops in Lion-sur-Mer, 6 June 1944.

images.title: D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944 B5043.jpg
images.description:
D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944
French civilians pass a British military policeman of No. 6 Beach Group in La Brèche d'Hermanville, 6 June 1944.

images.title: D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944 B5042.jpg
images.description:
D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944
French civilians show their identity cards to a British Royal Army Service Corps captain of No. 6 Beach Group in La Brèche d'Hermanville, 6 June 1944.

images.title: D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy, 6th June 1944 B5029.jpg
images.description:
D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy, 6th June 1944
Two wounded British soldiers from 3rd Division making their way back through La Brèche d'Hermanville, 6 June 1944.

images.title: D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944 B5038.jpg
images.description:
D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944
A Universal Carrier and motorcyclists of British 3rd Division in La Brèche d'Hermanville, 6 June 1944.

images.title: D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944 B5027.jpg
images.description:
D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944
German prisoners being escorted back through La Brèche d'Hermanville by men of the 2nd King's Shropshire Light Infantry, 6 June 1944.

images.title: D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944 B5039.jpg
images.description:
D-day - British Forces during the Invasion of Normandy 6 June 1944
Soldiers from A Company, 2nd Battalion the Royal Ulster Rifles, part of 3rd (British) Infantry Division pause in La Brèche d'Hermanville during their move inland, 6 June 1944.

images.title: Pied a terre EV4-Hermanville.jpg
images.description: Pied à terre sur l'Eurovélo 4 devant le poste de secours d'Hermanville
